source_pr.title: *: Use the new CI script as default
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #31893
A subtask of #30822

Problem Summary:

This is the final step of the "Make CI great again" task: replace the old script with the new one.
Please review other PRs under the #30822 first, most of them are split from this one.

After everything is ready, I'll update this PR 

### What is changed and how it works?

Use the new CI script to replace the old one.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test

Everytime the CI run, this script is executed.

- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: statistics/handle: fix some unstable test cases | rows := dbt.MustQuery("select plan from information_schema.slow_query where query like 'load data local infile % into table t_slow' order by time desc limit 1") (server/server_test.go)
failure_signature: statistics/handle: fix some unstable test cases | rows := dbt.MustQuery("select plan from information_schema.slow_query where query like 'load data local infile % into table t_slow' order by time desc limit 1") (server/server_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: statistics/handle: fix some unstable test cases | rows := dbt.MustQuery("select plan from information_schema.slow_query where query like 'load data local infile % into table t_slow' order by time desc limit 1") (server/server_test.go)

files: Makefile, config/config.toml.example, ddl/db_partition_test.go, ddl/integration_test.go, ddl/schema_test.go, ddl/stat_test.go, ddl/table_test.go, executor/main_test.go, executor/partition_table_test.go, server/server_test.go, server/tidb_serial_test.go, server/tidb_test.go, session/pessimistic_test.go, statistics/handle/handle_test.go, statistics/handle/update_test.go, tools/check/ut.go, tools/check/xprog.go
